Hero.description: I build fast, responsive, and scalable web interfaces using React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. My focus is clean architecture, reusable components, and delivering user experiences that feel smooth and modern.
Hero.highlight: Specialized in modern React ecosystems, UI performance optimization, and scalable frontend architecture.

CTA.title: Let's Build Something Amazing Together
CTA.description: Looking for a specialized developer to bring your ideas to life? I'm available for freelance work and full-time opportunities.

CaseStudy.sectionSubtitle: How we approach challenges and deliver results.
CaseStudy.problemDesc: The client had a legacy application that was slow, hard to maintain, and lacked responsiveness on modern devices, leading to high bounce rates.
CaseStudy.solutionDesc: We re-architected the frontend using a modern tech stack, implementing responsive layouts and optimizing rendering paths for a seamless user experience.
CaseStudy.techStackDesc: React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and GSAP for fluid animations.
CaseStudy.resultDesc: A 40% increase in mobile retention, a perfect 100 Lighthouse performance score, and significantly reduced maintenance overhead.

Journey.sectionSubtitle: The path that led me here.
Journey.year1Desc: Started my web development journey, focusing on core web technologies like HTML, CSS, Javascript, and React.
Journey.year2Desc: Began taking on freelance projects, delivering responsive single-page applications and establishing a strong portfolio.
Journey.year3Desc: Transitioned to full-stack development, mastering Next.js, TypeScript, and backend integrations to build highly scalable web apps.
Journey.year4Desc: Continuously exploring emerging technologies, focusing on AI integrations and creating seamless, highly interactive web experiences.

GitHub.sectionSubtitle: My open source contributions and recent projects.
